instruction: Navigate to Google Colab and sign in
Upload a notebook to Google Colab
Connect a T4 GPU runtime on Colab
action_sequence: find Connect T4 button in toolbar
wait for status to show Connected to Python 3 Google Compute Engine backend GPU

instruction: Run all cells in a Colab notebook
action_sequence: find Run all button in toolbar
monitor Executing status in bottom bar

instruction: Enter HuggingFace token in Colab input prompt
action_sequence: find textbox in cell output area

instruction: Navigate to USPTO Patent Center and sign in
File a follow-on submission on USPTO Patent Center
action_sequence: click Add Documents / Responses / Pay Fees
use JavaScript to click hidden file input
select document description from dropdown for each file
Cover Letter -> Applicant Response to Pre-Exam Formalities Notice
PTO_SB_15A -> Certification of Micro Entity (Gross Income Basis)

instruction: Select micro entity status and pay fees on USPTO
action_sequence: click Micro radio button for entity status
verify all documents and fee total

instruction: Push a trained model to HuggingFace
action_sequence: create repo via API: curl POST https://huggingface.co/api/repos/create

instruction: Search for a book on Amazon
action_sequence: try direct ASIN link instead of search
book page loads with title, price, format options

instruction: Generate SFT training data on Colab with pivot quality metrics
action_sequence: run Cell 3 (topic graph with Sacred Tongue affinity)

instruction: Train a model on Colab using generated SFT data
action_sequence: Cell 2: load Qwen2.5-0.5B in 4bit + add LoRA
Cell 3: load SFT data from Drive + format as chat
